summary: Comprehensive testing of Compass AI enterprise features: Authentication, Admin pages (API Keys, Audit Log), Benchmarks, and CRUD audit integration. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend routing for /admin/api-keys and /admin/audit-log correctly renders React pages (not API responses). Audit logging captures login events and CRUD operations.
passed_tests: Authentication: Admin login with admin@compass.ai works correctly
Authentication: Invalid credentials return 401
Authentication: User registration creates new user with JWT token
Authentication: Get current user (/api/auth/me) works with valid token
Authentication: Unauthenticated requests to protected routes return 401
Audit Log API: GET /api/audit-logs returns list of audit entries
Audit Log API: Login events are captured in audit logs
Audit Log API: GET /api/audit-logs/summary returns action/resource counts
Audit Log API: Requires authentication (returns 401 without token)
API Keys API: GET /api/api-keys lists user's API keys
API Keys API: POST /api/api-keys creates new key with scopes
API Keys API: DELETE /api/api-keys/{id} revokes key
Benchmarks API: GET /api/benchmarks/{sector} returns sector data
Benchmarks API: All sectors (SaaS, Healthcare, etc.) have seeded data
Benchmarks API: GET /api/benchmarks returns all sector benchmarks
Benchmarks API: Benchmark data includes percentiles and distribution
CRUD Audit Integration: Client creation generates audit log entry
CRUD Audit Integration: Client update generates audit log entry
Dashboard Stats API: GET /api/stats/dashboard returns counts
Frontend: /admin/api-keys renders React page with API Keys UI (not raw JSON)
Frontend: /admin/audit-log renders React page with Activity Timeline (not raw JSON)
Frontend: /benchmarks shows Governance Maturity Benchmark with sector comparison
Frontend: Sidebar navigation to API Keys works correctly
Frontend: Sidebar navigation to Audit Log works correctly
Frontend: Sidebar navigation to Benchmarks works correctly
Frontend: Create API Key modal shows permissions (Read/Write/Admin) and expiration
Frontend: Audit Log shows summary cards (Login Events, Create Events, Delete Events)
Frontend: Audit Log Activity Timeline shows login, create, update, delete actions
seed_data_creation: Benchmark data is seeded for all sectors (SaaS, Healthcare, Finance, etc.) via /api/benchmarks/seed endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enterprise features fully tested: (1) Admin pages /admin/api-keys and /admin/audit-log render as React pages with proper routing (fixed by changing from /api-keys to /admin/api-keys). (2) Audit logging captures login events and CRUD operations. (3) Benchmarks page shows seeded sector data with percentile comparisons. All API endpoints working correctly with JWT authentication.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working as expected
